creator: j@uriah.heep.sax.de
text:
As cheekiat@pacific.net.sg wrote:

> A dialogue box  " Write failure on tranfer! (wrote -1 bytes
> of 10240 byte)" appears. The background (ALT F2) display this messages
> (followed from a much longer list)
> " bin/cat
>   bin/chmod
>   bin/cp
>   pid 23:gunzip:uid0:exited on signal 11

Smells like bad hardware.  Disable all caches, and try again.

Let us know whether it's actually been hardware...

-- 
cheers, J"org

joerg_wunsch@uriah.heep.sax.de -- http://www.sax.de/~joerg/ -- NIC: JW11-RIPE
Never trust an operating system you don't have sources for. ;-)
